allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add class code details scraping to Workers'' Comp API

Enhanced the scrapeWorkersComp endpoint to scrape three sources:
- Proof of Coverage \(existing\)
- Exemption \(existing\) 
- Class Code Details \(new\) from insurancexdate.com

When Proof of Coverage returns data, the API now:
1. Extracts the Governing Class Code from the results table
2. Navigates to insurancexdate.com to search for the class code
3. Scrapes detailed information including industry, phraseology, description, and category

Key features:
- Sequential scraping using single browser instance for efficiency
- Conditional class code scraping \(only when POC has data\)
- Graceful error handling - class code failures don''t fail entire request
- Response includes classCodeDetails field \(null if not available\)
- Increased timeout from 22s to 25s to accommodate third scrape

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
